title: Figure 5 from: Sánchez Roque Y, Pérez-Luna Y, Moreira Acosta J, Farrera Vázquez  N, Berrones Hernández  R, Saldaña Trinidad  S, Pathiyamattom J (2018) Evaluation of the population dynamics of microalgae isolated from the state of Chiapas, Mexico with respect to the nutritional quality of water. Biodiversity Data Journal 6: e28496. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.6.e28496
author: Sánchez Roque, Yazmin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Evaluation of microalgal biomass production in BG11 and CHU medium after a period of 90 days with a 12/12 photoperiod for the different hydrographical areas of the state of Chiapas: SR: Suchiate river; NAR: Nandayapa river; HR: Huixtla river; SWC: Spring water Cahuaré; NR: Novillero river; WC: Wastewaters "La chacona"; PR: Pijijiapan river; SDR: Santo Domingo river. Bars are + one standard deviation. A means values of three replicates. The means followed by the same letter are not significantly different (P-value <0.05).
steps_raw: Figure 5 Evaluation of microalgal biomass production in BG11 and CHU medium after a period of 90 days with a 12/12 photoperiod for the different hydrographical areas of the state of Chiapas: SR: Suchiate river; NAR: Nandayapa river; HR: Huixtla river; SWC: Spring water Cahuaré; NR: Novillero river; WC: Wastewaters "La chacona"; PR: Pijijiapan river; SDR: Santo Domingo river. Bars are + one standard deviation. A means values of three replicates. The means followed by the same letter are not significantly different (P-value <0.05).
